headline: Will Sempra (SRE) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Sempra (SRE) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Sempra's Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Sempra is scheduled to release its first-quarter results next month, with analysts projecting single-digit earnings rise.

headline: New Report Shows Natural Gas Infrastructure Helps Keep Energy Costs More Affordable for California Households
summary: As Californians continue to grapple with rising household costs, a new report from Southern California Gas Company (SoCalGas) finds that when adjusted for inflation, SoCalGas's average residential natural gas rates declined by approximately 25% between 2000 and 20231 – highlighting how natural gas infrastructure has helped keep energy bills more affordable over time.
